InstitutionAddress: 6363 Alvarado Court, Suite 250, San Diego, CA 92120
TaskDescription: The N2pc was elicited using a simple visual search task based on Luck et al. (2006). Participants were given a target color of pink or blue at the beginning of a trial block, and responded on each trial whether the gap in the target color square was on the top or bottom.
Instructions: In this task, an array of squares will be presented to the left and right of a fixation point. For each block of trials you will be given a target color ([COLOR_ONE] or [COLOR_TWO]). Your task is to respond whether the target color square contains a gap on the top or bottom. If the gap is on the top of the target square, press the [TOP_BUTTON] with your dominant hand. If the gap is on the bottom of the target square, press the [BOTTOM_BUTTON] with your dominant hand. Please respond as quickly and accurately as possible and keep your eyes on the fixation point.
